# Supply Raid Owner Guidance / SRE 1.3.0 Pin

Source: Packer's official Supply Raid Thunderstore package/Wiki, plus Packer's
Supply Raid repository and release information.
Owner-provided guidance: official mapper links supplied to this handbook by the
Supply Raid mod owner on 2026-07-18.
Captured: 2026-07-18; pinned source/release reference retained from 2026-07-10.
Redistribution: link index only; upstream source remains in its pinned submodule.

| Need | Link |
| --- | --- |
| Official mapper baseline | https://thunderstore.io/c/h3vr/p/Packer/SupplyRaid/ (see **About** -> **Modding for Supply Raid**) |
| Additional official mapper documentation | https://thunderstore.io/c/h3vr/p/Packer/SupplyRaid/wiki/ |
| Pinned source reference | https://github.com/Packer/H3VR-Supply-Raid |
| SRE 1.3.0 release | https://github.com/Packer/H3VR-Supply-Raid/releases/tag/SRE-1.3.0 |

Use the official package page for Packer's mapper baseline and the official Wiki
for Map Components, SDK, and Supply Points. The package page captured on
2026-07-18 identifies `Packer-SupplyRaid-1.3.1`; that is a published-package
fact, not proof that this handbook's pinned SRE 1.3.0 source reference matches
it. Check the source/release boundary before assuming a workflow is current.
